summary: Security and Functionality Audit Tests for SeknuTo.cz - iteration 16. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Security fixes SEC-001, SEC-002, SEC-006 verified. Functionality fixes FUNC-003, FUNC-004, PERF-002 verified. Custom order UI flow tested successfully. Admin page handles new paginated bookings format correctly.
passed_tests: === SECURITY TESTS (SEC-001, SEC-002, SEC-006) ===
SEC-001: POST /api/vouchers without X-Admin-Token returns 401
SEC-001: GET /api/vouchers without X-Admin-Token returns 401
SEC-001: DELETE /api/vouchers/{code} without X-Admin-Token returns 401
SEC-002: DELETE /api/auth/google/disconnect without X-Admin-Token returns 401
SEC-006: Admin login returns token successfully
SEC-006: GET /api/vouchers with valid token returns list
=== FUNCTIONALITY TESTS (FUNC-003, FUNC-004, PERF-002) ===
FUNC-003: Coupon marked as used after booking (second validation returns 'Tento kupón již byl použit')
FUNC-004: Booking with custom_order service succeeds (validated service)
PERF-002: GET /api/admin/bookings returns {bookings: [], total: N} paginated format
Pydantic: Booking with invalid service 'invalid_service_xyz' returns 422
Standard booking with lawn_mowing service succeeds via API
=== ADMIN PAGE UI ===
Admin login works correctly
Admin dashboard loads
Bookings tab displays 14 bookings (handles new paginated format)
Vouchers tab loads with admin token authentication
=== CUSTOM ORDER UI FLOW ===
Step 1: 'Služby na objednávku' section with 'ZAKÁZKA' badge visible
Step 1: Can select 'Poptávka na zakázkové práce' option
Step 2: Customer type selection (Soukromá osoba / Firma) works
Step 2: Work type checkboxes work
Step 2: Description textarea works
Step 3: 'Dle dohody' price displayed for custom order
Step 3: Calendar date selection works
Step 4: Coupon section correctly hidden for custom order
Step 4: 'Cena dle dohody' info box visible
Step 4: Submit button says 'Odeslat poptávku'
Step 5: Success message 'Vaše poptávka byla úspěšně odeslána'
Step 5: 'Služby na objednávku' service name displayed
Step 5: 'Dle dohody' price shown in confirmation
critical_code_review_comments: SEC-001: verify_admin() correctly added to POST/GET/DELETE /vouchers endpoints
SEC-002: verify_admin() correctly added to DELETE /auth/google/disconnect
SEC-006: Admin session tokens have 24h expiration (line 1317: timedelta(hours=24))
FUNC-003: Coupon marked as used in create_booking (lines 630-635)
PERF-002: admin_get_bookings returns {bookings, total, skip, limit} (line 1355)
Rate limiting active: 5/min admin login, 30/min vouchers, 20/min coupons

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Admin page and custom order flow verified)

test_credentials.test_coupons_created: Multiple TEST* prefixed coupons for FUNC-003 testing

seed_data_creation: Created test coupons and bookings during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security audit complete. All SEC-001/002/006 fixes verified - voucher endpoints and google disconnect now require X-Admin-Token. FUNC-003 verified - coupons marked as used after booking. FUNC-004 verified - custom_order is valid service. PERF-002 verified - admin bookings returns paginated format {bookings, total}. Rate limiting active via slowapi. Admin page correctly handles new paginated format. Custom order UI flow works end-to-end.

mocked_apis.note: Google Calendar and Resend emails are mocked/not fully configured. Core booking and security functionality works.

functionality_verification.FUNC-003_coupon_used: Coupon marked used=True, active=False after booking
functionality_verification.PERF-002_pagination: Returns {bookings: array, total: int, skip: int, limit: int}
